BMGT380 BMGT495

3 3

Students must earn a minimum of 120 credits to complete a degree. Requirements for Graduation __ 50% of BMGT credits completed at UMCP. __ 45 credits of BMGT coursework completed. __ 60 credits earned at a 4-year school. __ 58 upper level credits completed. __ Last 30 credits completed at UMCP.
